scenario_assessments.reasoning: OS RHEL 8 is current; no immediate patch needed.
Application is containerized; ARM CPU adoption is feasible with image rebuilds.
Uses application server Glassfish 3.0; replacement/upgrade may be beneficial.
Application can be migrated to cloud (lift & shift).
High complexity (7/10); refactoring would reduce technical debt.
Database MySQL 5.7 is EOL; upgrade is critical for security.
Already using open source or managed database (MySQL 5.7).
Multiple outdated components detected (OS: CURRENT_VERSION, Lang: OUTDATED, DB: EOL).
